params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 perplexity V7-C per #701 verdict (V7-B URL parse OK but 403 VIEW_THREAD_NOT_ALLOW). V7-C: visibility='public' instead of 'private'. Hypothesis: public visibility bypasses backend's owner-only authorization on /rest/thread/<UUID> GET.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — observe SSE response visibility field (now 'public')
3. Network: GET /rest/thread/<UUID> — does it return 200 (success) or still 403?
4. DOM: warning bubble visible? private-thread modal absent?
5. URL: should stay on /search/<UUID> if thread accessible

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble + thread fetch 200 + no modal
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_403_persists: still 403 — owner check not bypassed by public visibility — escalate V7-D engine intercept

notes: 48차 perplexity V7-C — visibility=public bypass test. Hypothesis HP-Perplexity-O3.
